name: gitwarp
description: Worktree isolation, context, and task records for concurrent coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree isolation and task records for agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp to scan, summon, inspect, annotate, and collapse isolated git worktree sandboxes while preventing branch collisions across automated coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Set up an isolated workspace for this agent task.
Scan active GitWarp worktrees and inspect context before starting parallel work.
